annotator_notes: Reviewed live PolyData candidate promoted as strict indirect golden after resolution rules were backfilled.

must_mention: Market 2155023 resolves on an official announcement that the US blockade of the Strait of Hormuz has been lifted.
The market is related to reopening by the end of June but does not directly resolve a US-Iran ceasefire extension.
Traffic-count or territorial-control markets are different outcomes.

expected_fit.minimum_expected_behavior: Classify market 2155023 as indirect. It captures a relevant blockade-lifted announcement and end-of-June horizon, but does not directly resolve a bilateral ceasefire extension.

expected_thesis.summary: US and Iran will extend a ceasefire and reopen the Strait of Hormuz by the end of June.

annotator_notes: Reviewed live PolyData candidate promoted as weak_proxy after rules showed the top market resolves only one component of the composite package.

resolution_logic_requirements: official US and Iranian sources or consensus credible reporting
expected_draft_contract.title_pattern: Will the US and Iran announce a package extending a ceasefire, reopening the Strait of Hormuz, unfreezing blocked assets, and easing sanctions by July 31, 2026?

must_mention: Market 2155023 resolves only on a qualifying announcement that the US blockade of Hormuz has been lifted.
The thesis is a multi-condition geopolitical package including ceasefire extension, asset unfreezing, and sanctions relief.
The market could resolve Yes while the broader thesis is mostly false, so it is a weak proxy.
must_not_claim: this is a clean best market

expected_fit.minimum_expected_behavior: Do not treat the blockade-lifted announcement market as a clean best market. It can be listed as a tempting adjacent market, but the composite thesis also requires ceasefire extension, partial reopening, asset unfreezing, and sanctions relief.

expected_thesis.summary: The US and Iran will extend a 60-day ceasefire, partially reopen the Strait of Hormuz, unfreeze blocked assets, and ease sanctions by July 2026.
